languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн оживленно беседует сам с собой, даже не оборачиваясь на сервочереп-пустышку за плечом.{/n} "Нет, Нунциус, я уверен, что масштабирование эксперимента возможно даже без надежной материальной базы ксеносских реликвий. Оставь цинизм при себе. Триасомия неизбежна как новая практика".

{n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

Оставь цинизм при себе. Триасомия неизбежна как новая практика".

Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

{n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

{n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn habla alegremente consigo mismo, sin girarse hacia el servocráneo que flota sobre su hombro.{/n} «No, Nuncius, estoy seguro de que podemos ampliar la escala del experimento aunque no tengamos una base material de reliquias xenos fiable. Guárdese el cinismo, la triasomía es el futuro de nuestra práctica».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn habla alegremente consigo mismo, sin girarse hacia el servocráneo que flota sobre su hombro.{/n} «No, Nuncius, estoy seguro de que podemos ampliar la escala del experimento aunque no tengamos una base material de reliquias xenos fiable. Guárdese el cinismo, la triasomía es el futuro de nuestra práctica».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡正激动地自言自语，甚至没有转身去看悬在他肩头的那个呆滞的伺服头骨。{/n}“不，努恩修斯，我确信，即便没有异形遗物作为可靠的物质基础，我们也能扩大实验的规模。收起你的愤世嫉俗。三相体，才是我们实践的归宿。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡正激动地自言自语，甚至没有转身去看悬在他肩头的那个呆滞的伺服头骨。{/n}“不，努恩修斯，我确信，即便没有异形遗物作为可靠的物质基础，我们也能扩大实验的规模。收起你的愤世嫉俗。三相体，才是我们实践的归宿。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se parle avec agitation, sans même jeter un regard en arrière vers le servocrâne inanimé.{/n} « Non, Nuncius, je suis certain que nous pouvons mener cette expérience à plus grande échelle même sans base matérielle fiable de reliques xénos. Épargne-moi ton cynisme. La triasomia est l'avenir de notre art. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se parle avec agitation, sans même jeter un regard en arrière vers le servocrâne inanimé.{/n} « Non, Nuncius, je suis certain que nous pouvons mener cette expérience à plus grande échelle même sans base matérielle fiable de reliques xénos. Épargne-moi ton cynisme. La triasomia est l'avenir de notre art. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn spricht angeregt mit sich selbst und dreht sich nicht einmal um, um den Servoschädel über seiner Schulter anzusehen.{/n} "Nein, Nuncius, ich bin sicher, wir können das Experiment auch ohne eine verlässliche materielle Basis aus Xenosrelikten ausweiten. Spart Euch Euren Zynismus. Triasomie ist die Zukunft unseres Handwerks."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn spricht angeregt mit sich selbst und dreht sich nicht einmal um, um den Servoschädel über seiner Schulter anzusehen.{/n} "Nein, Nuncius, ich bin sicher, wir können das Experiment auch ohne eine verlässliche materielle Basis aus Xenosrelikten ausweiten. Spart Euch Euren Zynismus. Triasomie ist die Zukunft unseres Handwerks."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは、肩越しのダミーのサーヴォスカルを振り返りもせず、熱心に独り言を言っている。{/n}「いいや、ヌンキウス、私は確信している――異種族の遺物という確かな物質的基盤がなくとも、実験の規模は拡大できるとね。君の皮肉は胸に仕舞っておきたまえ。トリアソミアこそ、我々の営みの未来なのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは、肩越しのダミーのサーヴォスカルを振り返りもせず、熱心に独り言を言っている。{/n}「いいや、ヌンキウス、私は確信している――異種族の遺物という確かな物質的基盤がなくとも、実験の規模は拡大できるとね。君の皮肉は胸に仕舞っておきたまえ。トリアソミアこそ、我々の営みの未来なのだ。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, kendi kendine hararetle konuşuyor. Omzunun üzerinden cansız hizmelete bakmak için arkasını bile dönmüyor.{/n} "Hayır Nuncius, eminim ki zeno kalıntılarının güvenilir bir maddi temeli olmadan bile deneyin kapsamını genişletebiliriz. Kuşkuculuğunu kendine sakla. Üçyeközleştirme, işimizin geleceği olacak."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn is talking animatedly to himself, not even turning around to look at the dummy servo-skull over his shoulder.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that we can expand the scale of the experiment even without a reliable material basis of xenos relics. Keep your cynicism to yourself. Triasomia is the future of our practice."

Omzunun üzerinden cansız hizmelete bakmak için arkasını bile dönmüyor.{/n} "Hayır Nuncius, eminim ki zeno kalıntılarının güvenilir bir maddi temeli olmadan bile deneyin kapsamını genişletebiliriz.
